{{Quote|On your way out, be sure to try the vagnerian canapes at the bar. Quite tasty.|Leb Slesher, to a spacer|<ref name="swg" />}}
'''Vagnerian canapés''' were sweet, tasty pastries that were often served at formal dinners.<ref name="swg">{{SWGcite|exp=AED|type=item|Vagnerian Canape}}</ref> They were occasionally served in the [[New Republic Senate/Legends|New Republic Senate]] chambers and were a favorite of [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia Organa Solo]].

==Behind the scenes==
In [[The New Rebellion]], Vagnerian is lower-cased. But in [[Fate of the Jedi: Omen]], Vagnerian is upper-cased.
